subject.appearance: A grainy, high-contrast video of a glowing mysterious briefcase sitting on a abandoned warehouse office. A small 'Parallel' logo sticker is partially visible.

movement_timeline.action: Camera shakes slightly as someone's hand reaches out to touch the artifact.
Lighting flickers as if from a faulty overhead light. The hand quickly pulls back.

environment.location: A dimly lit, messy abandoned warehouse office room with blueprint papers on the walls.

temporal_consistency: The artifact geometry must remain rigid
Hand movement must follow human kinetics
Lighting flicker must affect all surfaces consistently

forbidden_elements: morphing, melting, extra limbs, plastic skin, CGI look, bright saturated colors, steady camera
